synthetic_note: The test project does not have Anthropic-on-Vertex enabled (live attempt 404'd at the model-availability gate before reaching message validation). The request.json above is a real recording of what the lib's `convert_request` produces for this scenario, so the wire shape is accurate; the response.sse is hand-authored from Anthropic's documented `invalid_request_error` envelope for messages.0 not being a user role (https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/messages — 'The first message must use the user role'). Replace with a real capture via `cargo run --example capture_traces` once the compaction rebuild is fixed and Anthropic-on-Vertex access is available; the matching success assertion in `snapshot_traces.rs` will flip green at that point.
